title: Xtra Sweet Xanthan Folded Thai Pork Pad Thai Fold
description: A savory and comforting Thai dish featuring tender pork, nectarines, and a sweet and tangy sauce, all wrapped in a crispy rice noodle fold.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the pork to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is softened and translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Add the cooked noodles and pork back to the skillet and stir to combine.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the noodle mixture onto a flat surface.
Add a slice of nectarine on top of the noodles, followed by a sprinkle of chopped peanuts if desired.
Fold the noodles and nectarine in half to enclose the filling, and serve immediately.
